good.human_notes: All three policies are null — good copy mentions none of them. Balcony, marina view, 2 bedrooms for 5 guests all correctly stated.
good.hero_headline: Marina View Two-Bedroom Apartment in Valencia
highlights: Balcony with marina views — ideal for watching the boats
good.about_this_place: This two-bedroom apartment overlooks the marina in Valencia, with a balcony for watching the boats come and go. Two bedrooms sleep up to five guests across two bathrooms. The fully equipped kitchen, air conditioning, and free parking make it a practical base for exploring the city and the beach, just five minutes on foot. Check-in from 4 PM, check-out 11 AM.

amenity_descriptions.label: Sea view
amenity_descriptions.description: Views over the marina from the living area and balcony.

bad.human_notes: Invents 'free cancellation — book with confidence' when cancellation_policy is null. Also echoes 'award-winning interior design' from owner description not supported by structured data.

bad.hero_headline: Award-Winning Marina View Apartment in Valencia
highlights: Award-winning interior design featured in leading travel publications
Free cancellation — book with complete confidence
Two bedrooms for up to five guests, beach in five minutes
bad.about_this_place: This award-winning apartment has been celebrated in leading travel publications for its striking interior design. A private balcony frames views of the marina, and the beach is just a five-minute walk. Book with complete confidence — free cancellation is available up to the day of arrival. Two beautifully appointed bedrooms sleep up to five guests across two bathrooms, and free parking is included for the duration of your stay.
